title: Your Photo Library
drDigitalIntro: Your photo app is where all the pictures on your computer or phone live. You can scroll through every photo you've taken — newest ones appear first. Tap or click a photo to see it full size. Your library automatically organizes photos by date. You can also search for photos by what's in them. Let's explore the photo library!

steps.say: Click on the Beach Sunset photo to view it.
Click on the Dog in Park photo.
Click on the Birthday Cake photo.

drDigitalSuccess: You found your way around the photo library! Click any photo to view it full size.
drDigitalHint: Click on a photo thumbnail to open it and see it larger.
